translations.en: a tiny little man with wild eyes.
translations.zh: 一位眼神狂野的矮小男子。

translations.en: "Yeah. Ok. Yeah."
translations.zh: 「是啊，好的，是啊。」

translations.en: He looks you up and down and then claps his hands together. "Yeah. Ok. Yeah."
translations.zh: 他上下打量汝，然後將雙手一拍。「是啊，好的，是啊。」

translations.en: "Back for some more wine?"
translations.zh: 「回來再買些酒？」

translations.en: "What can I do you for?"
translations.zh: 「有何效勞之處？」

translations.en: "@Stivius the wine merchant is mine."
translations.zh: 「@Stivius（斯提）維斯，葡萄酒商人，乃在下大名。」

translations.en: "Quite a name, eh?"
translations.zh: 「好個名字，是吧？」

translations.en: "I make @wine."
translations.zh: 「在下釀製@wine（葡萄）酒。」

translations.en: "Yeah. Maybe you want to buy some."
translations.zh: 「是啊，或許汝想買些。」

translations.en: "It's not just a @tale you've been hearing."
translations.zh: 「汝所聽聞的，並非單純的@tale（傳言）。」

translations.en: "Everyone knows that @Quenton haunts this town."
translations.zh: 「人人都知道@Quenton（昆頓）的幽靈在此地徘徊。」

translations.en: "If I had been @murdered by those evil ones...but that's just gossip."
translations.zh: 「若我也被那些惡徒@murdered（謀殺）……但那只是流言罷了。」

translations.en: "It was late one night and I had just returned from my fields."
translations.zh: 「那是一個深夜，我剛從田地裡回來。」

translations.en: "'Course my path takes me right by @Gideon's garden."
translations.zh: 「當然，我走的路正好經過@Gideon（吉迪）恩的花園。」

translations.en: "I heard a @noise by the well and saw some @dark forms hunched there."
translations.zh: 「我聽到井邊有@noise（聲響），並看見一些@dark（黑影）蜷伏在那裡。」

translations.en: "They had huge wings and @evil red eyes."
translations.zh: 「他們有巨大的翅膀和@evil（邪惡）的紅色眼睛。」

translations.en: "I ran like the wind to my doorway. I was sure I was dead."
translations.zh: 「我如飛奔回門口，以為自己必死無疑。」

translations.en: "He was a nice enough soul. I sold many bottles to him."
translations.zh: 「他是個頗可親的人，我賣了許多瓶酒給他。」

translations.en: "Gideon runs the Haunting @Inn."
translations.zh: 「吉迪恩打理鬼影@Inn（客棧）。」

translations.en: "His @wife has a garden which you can see from my front door."
translations.zh: 「他@wife（妻）的花園從我門口就能看到。」

translations.en: "It's the Inn straight across the lane from here."
translations.zh: 「就是從這裡徑直穿過小巷的那家旅店。」

translations.en: "She doesn't do much. Helps him run the place."
translations.zh: 「她不太出門，就幫他打理旅店。」

translations.en: "Twas a strange @whispering, in a tongue I could not understand."
translations.zh: 「那是一種奇異的@whispering（低語），用的是我聽不懂的語言。」

translations.en: "It didn't sound like any language I ever heard."
translations.zh: 「那聽起來不像我曾聽過的任何語言。」

translations.en: "More like one o' them guild @languages."
translations.zh: 「更像是某種公會的@languages（行話）。」

translations.en: "Like the one the @alchemist speaks."
translations.zh: 「就像那位@alchemist（鍊金）術士說的那種。」

translations.en: "Go ask old @Horance. He can tell ya - if you can understand him!"
translations.zh: 「去問老@Horance（霍蘭）斯，他能解答汝——如果汝聽得懂他說的話！」

translations.en: "He lives over on @Ivers Rounding by himself.
translations.zh: 「他獨居在@Ivers（艾佛）圓角那邊。

translations.en: "You must be new to this village."
translations.zh: 「汝一定是初來此村吧。」

translations.en: "Go see @Marney, she'll get you there."
translations.zh: 「去找@Marney（瑪妮），她能帶汝前往。」

translations.en: "She's the daughter of @Quenton - the ghost."
translations.zh: 「她是@Quenton（昆頓）的女兒——就是那個幽靈的女兒。」

translations.en: "I couldn't see too clearly. They were about man-@sized though."
translations.zh: 「我看得不太清楚，但他們大約是人@sized（身般）大小。」

translations.en: "Yes, but they were hunched down so it was hard to see them."
translations.zh: 「是的，但他們蜷縮著，所以難以看清。」

translations.en: His eyes widen. "@Gargoyles they were!"
translations.zh: 他眼睛睜大。「那是@Gargoyles（魔像族）族！」

translations.en: "Must'a been ten or @twelve of 'em."
translations.zh: 「定是有個十隻或@twelve（十二）隻。」

translations.en: "Well, perhaps more like two or three."
translations.zh: 「呃，或許是兩三隻。」

translations.en: "I didn't stay around and count 'em."
translations.zh: 「我可沒留下來數清楚。」

translations.en: "Yes. Big, ugly, snarling beasts."
translations.zh: 「是的，碩大、醜陋、齜牙咧嘴的惡獸。」

translations.en: "'Course, they were @kneeling when I saw 'em."
translations.zh: 「當然，我看到他們時，他們正在@kneeling（跪著）。」

translations.en: "You know, on their knees."
translations.zh: 「就是跪在地上的那種。」

translations.en: "I don't care much for him. He's always trying to get me to sell him my wine cheaper."
translations.zh: 「我不太喜歡他，他總想讓我降價賣酒給他。」

translations.en: "She's my sweetie."
translations.zh: 「她是我的心上人。」

translations.en: He clasps his hands next to his cheek. "I count the hours until I can see her."
translations.zh: 他雙手合掌貼在臉旁。「我掰著指頭盼著見她。」

translations.en: "I have never talked to him. He bought wine from me once but that's it."
translations.zh: 「我從未和他說過話。他曾向我買過一次酒，僅此而已。」

translations.en: "Well, what's to say? I am glad he is again our ruler."
translations.zh: 「哦，能說什麼？我很高興他再度成為吾等的君主。」

translations.en: "Come back if you get thirsty."
translations.zh: 「口渴了再來找在下。」

translations.en: "Ask someone else about that."
translations.zh: 「此事另詢他人吧。」

translations.en: "Which of you?"
translations.zh: 「你們哪位？」

translations.en: "Which item?"
translations.zh: 「哪種酒？」

translations.en: $N smiles at $Y. "For $0 it will cost you #1 gold. Interested?"
translations.zh: $N向$Y微笑。「$0售價#1枚金幣，有興趣否？」

translations.en: "You look pretty full to me."
translations.zh: 「汝看來已滿載了。」

translations.en: "Excellent!" After accepting $Y's gold, $N hands over the wine.
translations.zh: 「甚好！」收下$Y的金幣後，$N將葡萄酒交予其手。

translations.en: $N looks at $Y. "You don't have enough gold."
translations.zh: $N看向$Y。「汝的金幣不足。」

translations.en: "Enjoy your $1."
translations.zh: 「請享用汝的$1。」

translations.en: "Too bad, it's really good wine."
translations.zh: 「可惜，那真是上好的佳釀。」

translator_notes: 084 Stivius: 奇特的葡萄酒商人，愛戀德薩娜。目擊魔像族現身。口頭禪「是啊，好的」保留。
